description: Complete tile list covering ALL game entities, states, and combinations. Expanded from the original 58-tile POC to full coverage.

tiles.prompt_fragment: WATER terrain. Oceans, lakes, rivers. Blue water with waves, depth variation. Seamlessly tiles with adjacent water. Top-down view.
PEAK. Impassable mountain peaks. Snow-capped, jagged, forbidding. Sharp rocky summits. Dangerous and blocking. Top-down view.
MOUNTAIN terrain. Rocky mountain terrain with passable trails. Grey-brown rock, some snow. Less extreme than peaks. Top-down view.
HILL terrain. Rolling gentle hills, grassy slopes. Moderate elevation. Green with brown earth showing. Top-down view.
FLAT terrain. Open plains, grassland, fertile ground. Light green with hints of dirt paths. Inviting and buildable. Top-down view.
VOLCANO. Active volcanic terrain with lava cracks, smoke, ash, sulfur. Orange-red glow on dark rock. Hostile. Top-down view.
DESERT. Arid sand dunes, cracked dry earth, occasional dead tree or bones. Yellow/tan palette. Harsh sun. Top-down view.
TUNDRA. Frozen ground, patchy snow, sparse low scrub. Grey-white-brown. Cold, bleak, windswept. Top-down view.
BARREN ground. Rocky terrain with occasional tough grass or scrub. Grey-brown with hints of green. Sparse. Top-down view.
LIGHT VEGETATION. Green grassland with wildflowers, scattered low bushes. Pleasant, pastoral. Light green. Top-down view.
GOOD LAND. Rich fertile farmland, lush green fields, golden wheat hints, tall grass. The most desirable land. Top-down view.
WOOD. Scattered deciduous trees with clearings. Dappled sunlight. Medium green, less dense than forest. Top-down view.
Dense FOREST. Thick tree canopy, dark green evergreens and deciduous mix. Hard to traverse. Top-down view showing canopy.
JUNGLE. Thick tropical vegetation, vines, dense canopy. Dark green, humid. Extremely difficult terrain. Top-down view.
SWAMP. Murky standing water, dead trees, reeds, moss. Dark green-brown, sickly. Optional mist. Top-down view.
ICE. Frozen ice sheets, blue-white, crystalline. Cracks and glacial features. Cold palette. Top-down view.
NO VEGETATION. Bare terrain, exposed rock or soil. Neutral background. Top-down view.
TOWN. Small medieval settlement. Few buildings, thatched roofs, central square, a well. On green terrain background. Top-down view.
CITY. Large walled medieval city. Multiple buildings, church spire, busy streets, stone walls. On green terrain. Top-down view.
MINE. Metal extraction. Mine shaft entrance in hillside, timber supports, ore cart tracks, rock pile. On rocky terrain. Top-down view.
FARM. Plowed agricultural fields, a barn, haystacks, crop rows in neat lines. On green fertile terrain. Top-down view.
DEVASTATED. War-ravaged ruins. Burned buildings, smoke, rubble, craters, ash. Dark and scorched. Top-down view.
GOLD MINE. Rich mine with visible gold veins, jewel deposits, elaborate entrance. Glittering. On rocky terrain. Top-down view.
FORT. Stone military fortress. Walls, corner towers, battlements, gate. Imposing and defensive. On terrain. Top-down view.
RUIN. Crumbling stone walls, collapsed buildings, overgrown weeds. Once grand, now fallen. Haunting. Top-down view.
STOCKADE. Wooden palisade walls, log towers, a gate. Rough frontier fortification. Simpler than stone fort. Top-down view.
CAPITOL. Grand palace/castle, banners flying, most impressive structure. Crown jewel of a nation. Should STAND OUT. Top-down view.
SPECIAL. Mysterious glowing structure, ancient monument, magical aura. Unique and intriguing. Magical energy. Top-down view.
LUMBER YARD. Stacked logs, sawmill with water wheel, logging equipment, wood chips. Productive. On wooded terrain. Top-down view.
BLACKSMITH. Forge with chimney smoke, anvil, glowing hot metal, weapon racks. Heat and fire visible. Top-down view.
ROAD. Clear cobblestone or packed dirt road cutting through terrain. Travel-worn, connecting edges. Top-down view.
MILL. Windmill with turning blades, or water mill on stream. Productive, grain processing. On terrain. Top-down view.
GRANARY. Large storage building, grain sacks, full bins. Secure and well-stocked food reserve. On terrain. Top-down view.
CHURCH. Medieval church with steeple and cross, stained glass hints, small graveyard. Sacred ground. Top-down view.
UNIVERSITY. Grand stone building with columns, tall windows. Academic and prestigious center of learning. Top-down view.
UNDESIGNATED. Raw cleared land with a boundary marker or small flag. Claimed but undeveloped. Open potential. Top-down view.
BASE CAMP. Military tents, campfire, weapon stacks, supply wagons. Temporary but organized staging area. Top-down view.

tiles._comment: Generic (race-neutral) army in each status. Used as fallback when no race-specific tile exists.

tiles.prompt_fragment: MARCHING ARMY. Medieval soldiers in column formation, on the move. Weapons shouldered, banners carried, marching across green terrain. Dust trail. Movement and purpose. Top-down view.
SCOUT unit. A single light rider or ranger on horseback, fast and stealthy. Cloak, no banner, traveling light. Moving quickly across terrain. Top-down view.
GARRISONED ARMY. Troops manning walls and towers of a fortification. Standing watch, spears upright, defensive positions on stone walls. Static and vigilant. Top-down view.
DEFENDING ARMY. Shield wall formation, braced for impact. Shields locked together, spears forward, tight disciplined formation on terrain. Defensive posture. Top-down view.
MAGICALLY DEFENDED ARMY. Shield wall formation surrounded by a glowing magical barrier/dome. Blue-white arcane energy shield protecting the troops. Mystical runes visible. Top-down view.
ATTACKING ARMY. Soldiers charging forward, weapons drawn, battle cry. Aggressive formation, swords and spears out, banners flying. Dynamic motion. Top-down view.
MAGICALLY ENHANCED ATTACK. Charging army wreathed in fire/lightning magic. Red-orange arcane energy surrounding weapons. Blazing enchanted assault. Top-down view.
ROUTING/FLEEING ARMY. Soldiers running away in disorganized panic. Dropped shields, broken formation, fear. Chaotic retreat. Top-down view.
SIEGE. Army with siege equipment — battering rams, catapults, siege towers — positioned against walls. Preparing to assault a fortification. Top-down view.
BESIEGED. Troops trapped behind walls, surrounded. Enemy forces visible outside. Supplies dwindling, defensive but desperate. Top-down view.
SORTIE. Troops bursting OUT through fortress gates to attack besiegers. Gates open, cavalry and infantry pouring out aggressively. Top-down view.
GENERAL/COMMANDER. Distinguished leader figure with command tent, strategic banners, bodyguard. Larger/special unit marker, crown or helm visible. Top-down view.
TROOPS ON SHIP. Soldiers visible on the deck of a transport ship. Army loaded onto vessel, shields along the gunwale. Ship on water. Top-down view.
ARMY GROUP. Multiple unit banners grouped together, large combined force. Several formations merged into one massive army. Multiple standards visible. Top-down view.
HUMAN army. Standard medieval European soldiers. Plate armor, swords, shields with heraldry, orderly formation. On green terrain.
ORC army. Green-skinned warriors, crude but brutal weapons (axes, clubs), tribal banners, menacing. On terrain.
ELF army. Elegant warriors with bows, flowing cloaks, leaf motifs, graceful. Nature-attuned. On forest terrain.
DWARF army. Short stout warriors with axes and war hammers, heavy armor, beards, sturdy shields. On mountain terrain.
LIZARD army. Reptilian humanoid warriors, scaled skin, tribal spears and shields, swamp aesthetic. On swampy terrain.
PIRATE army. Skull and crossbones, cutlasses, bandanas, ragged but dangerous. Coastal/beach terrain.
SAVAGE army. Primitive tribal warriors, bone weapons, war paint, feathers, fierce. On barren terrain.
NOMAD army. Horse-mounted warriors, curved swords, flowing robes, caravan banners. On desert terrain.

tiles._comment: ═══════════════ RACE × STATUS COMBOS (8 races × 5 key statuses = 40) ═══════════════
The 5 most visually distinct statuses per race: march, defend, attack, siege, flight

tiles.prompt_fragment: HUMAN army MARCHING. Plate-armored knights and infantry in organized column, heraldic banners, marching across plains. Top-down view.
HUMAN army DEFENDING. Shield wall of steel shields with heraldic crests, spears bristling, disciplined formation braced for attack. Top-down view.
HUMAN army ATTACKING. Knights charging on horseback, infantry with swords drawn, heraldic banners streaming. Dynamic charge. Top-down view.
HUMAN army SIEGE. Trebuchets and siege towers manned by armored soldiers, battering ram at castle gates. Organized siege. Top-down view.
HUMAN army FLEEING. Plate-armored soldiers dropping shields and running, broken formation, panic. Heraldic banners abandoned. Top-down view.
ORC army MARCHING. Green-skinned orcs in rough column, tribal drums, crude banners with skulls, heavy footsteps. Top-down view.
ORC army DEFENDING. Orcs behind spiked barricades, shields of bone and wood, snarling and ready. Brutal defensive position. Top-down view.
ORC army ATTACKING. Orcs in berserker charge, axes and clubs raised, war cries, chaotic but terrifying assault. Top-down view.
ORC army SIEGE. Crude but massive siege equipment — battering logs, rock-throwing trolls, orcs scaling walls with ladders. Top-down view.
ORC army FLEEING. Orcs scattering in disarray, pushing each other, dropping crude weapons, cowardly retreat. Top-down view.
ELF army MARCHING. Graceful elven warriors gliding through forest, leaf-pattern cloaks, longbows, silent and orderly. Top-down view.
ELF army DEFENDING. Elven archers behind tree-shaped barricades, bows drawn, nature-woven shields, elegant defensive line. Top-down view.
ELF army ATTACKING. Elven warriors charging with glowing swords and arrows, swift and deadly, forest magic crackling. Top-down view.
ELF army SIEGE. Elven forces using enchanted trees as siege engines, magical vines pulling at walls, nature-powered assault. Top-down view.
ELF army FLEEING. Elves retreating swiftly into treeline, dropping bows, graceful but panicked withdrawal. Top-down view.
DWARF army MARCHING. Stocky dwarf warriors in heavy plate, axes on shoulders, mining banners, steady determined march. Top-down view.
DWARF army DEFENDING. Dwarves in shield wall, tower shields locked, axes ready, immovable stone-like formation. Top-down view.
DWARF army ATTACKING. Dwarves charging with war hammers and axes, berserker rage, heavy armor crashing forward. Top-down view.
DWARF army SIEGE. Dwarven engineers with tunneling machines, explosive charges, mechanical siege equipment. Mining under walls. Top-down view.
DWARF army FLEEING. Dwarves retreating in shame, heavy armor slowing them, axes dragging. Rare and humiliating. Top-down view.
LIZARD army MARCHING. Reptilian warriors slithering through swamp, tribal spears, bone totems carried. Predatory formation. Top-down view.
LIZARD army DEFENDING. Lizardfolk behind mud-and-reed barricades, poisoned spears bristling, camouflaged in swamp. Top-down view.
LIZARD army ATTACKING. Lizardfolk leaping forward with javelins and claws, feral and fast, swamp creatures joining the attack. Top-down view.
LIZARD army SIEGE. Lizardfolk using massive swamp beasts as living siege engines, scaling walls with claws, primitive but effective. Top-down view.
LIZARD army FLEEING. Lizardfolk scattering back into swamp water, diving under murk, dropping weapons. Disappearing into marsh. Top-down view.
PIRATE army MARCHING. Ragged pirates with cutlasses and pistols, jolly roger banners, swaggering march along coast. Top-down view.
PIRATE army DEFENDING. Pirates behind overturned boats and barrel barricades, firing crossbows and pistols. Improvised defense. Top-down view.
PIRATE army ATTACKING. Pirates boarding and charging with cutlasses, grappling hooks, explosive grenades. Chaotic assault. Top-down view.
PIRATE army SIEGE. Pirates using stolen cannons, powder kegs at walls, grapple-and-scale tactics. Dirty but effective. Top-down view.
PIRATE army FLEEING. Pirates running for their ships, grabbing loot as they flee, every man for himself. Cowardly scatter. Top-down view.
SAVAGE army MARCHING. Tribal warriors with bone weapons, war paint, feathered headdresses, rhythmic chanting march. Top-down view.
SAVAGE army DEFENDING. Tribal warriors behind sharpened-stake walls, bone shields, ritual totems protecting the line. Top-down view.
SAVAGE army ATTACKING. Berserker tribal warriors charging with primal fury, bone clubs and spears, war paint glowing. Top-down view.
SAVAGE army SIEGE. Tribal warriors using massive bone/wood rams, fire arrows, climbing walls with bare hands. Primal assault. Top-down view.
SAVAGE army FLEEING. Tribal warriors scattering into wilderness, dropping bone weapons, vanishing into brush. Top-down view.
NOMAD army MARCHING. Horse-mounted warriors crossing desert, flowing robes, curved swords, caravan formation. Top-down view.
NOMAD army DEFENDING. Horsemen in circle formation, bows outward, horses as barricades, desert camp defense. Top-down view.
NOMAD army ATTACKING. Mounted cavalry charge, curved swords flashing, horse archers firing, desert dust cloud. Top-down view.
NOMAD army SIEGE. Horsemen circling fortification, fire arrows raining, mobile siege. Steppe tactics against walls. Top-down view.
NOMAD army FLEEING. Horsemen galloping away at full speed, robes streaming behind, tactical retreat into desert. Top-down view.

tiles._comment: 3 ship sizes × generic + key race variants

tiles.prompt_fragment: LIGHT SHIP. Small, fast scouting vessel. Single mast, few crew, nimble on waves. Sloop or cutter. On blue water. Top-down view.
MEDIUM SHIP. Standard warship. Two masts, armed with ballistae, moderate crew. Capable combat vessel. On blue water. Top-down view.
HEAVY SHIP. Massive warship/galleon. Three masts, heavily armed, large crew. Dominates the seas. Imposing. On blue water. Top-down view.
FLEET. Multiple ships sailing together in formation. Mix of sizes, coordinated naval force. On blue water. Top-down view.
TRANSPORT SHIP. Wide-hulled vessel carrying troops. Soldiers visible on deck, shields along gunwale. Troop carrier on water. Top-down view.
NAVAL COMBAT. Two ships engaged — ramming, arrows flying between ships, fire, boarding planks. Active sea battle. Top-down view.
HUMAN warship. Ornate medieval caravel with heraldic sails, ballista turrets, disciplined crew. On blue water. Top-down view.
ELF warship. Sleek swan-shaped vessel, living wood hull, leaf-pattern sails, graceful and fast. On blue water. Top-down view.
ORC warship. Crude but massive, spiked ram, skull-decorated, dark sails, intimidating bulk. On dark water. Top-down view.
DWARF warship. Low ironclad vessel, steam/mechanical elements, heavy armor plating, dwarven engineering. On water. Top-down view.
PIRATE warship. Black sails with skull and crossbones, fast and dangerous, cannons bristling. Classic pirate ship. On water. Top-down view.
NOMAD ship. Dhow-style vessel with lateen sails, desert colors, raiders of the coast. On water. Top-down view.

tiles._comment: Individual unit type sprites. Each shows the unit clearly identifiable at tile size.

tiles.prompt_fragment: MILITIA. Poorly equipped peasant conscripts. Pitchforks, simple tunics, no armor. Ragtag but numerous. Single tile, top-down view.
GOBLINS. Small green-skinned creatures with rusty daggers and shields. Sneaky, numerous, weak individually. Single tile, top-down view.
ORC WARRIORS. Muscular green-skinned orcs with crude iron axes and studded leather. Brutish and strong. Single tile, top-down view.
INFANTRY. Standard human foot soldiers. Chain mail, swords, wooden shields. Disciplined rank and file. Single tile, top-down view.
SAILORS. Seamen in naval garb with cutlasses. Light armor, experienced at sea. Nautical equipment visible. Single tile, top-down view.
MARINES. Elite naval infantry. Heavier armor than sailors, boarding pikes and shields. Tough sea warriors. Single tile, top-down view.
ARCHERS. Bowmen with longbows, quivers of arrows, light leather armor. Ranged combat specialists. Single tile, top-down view.
URUK-HAI. Large elite orcs in heavy dark armor, broad swords, white hand emblem. Powerful and disciplined. Single tile, top-down view.
NINJAS. Shadow warriors in black garb, throwing stars, katanas. Stealthy assassins. Partially hidden. Single tile, top-down view.
PHALANX. Greek-style heavy infantry with long spears and large round shields. Tight formation, overlapping shields. Single tile, top-down view.
OLOG-HAI. Massive armored trolls, towering over others. Stone-skinned, wielding tree-trunk clubs. Devastating. Single tile, top-down view.
LEGIONARIES. Roman-style soldiers with rectangular shields (scutum), gladius swords, red cloaks. Professional army. Single tile, top-down view.
DRAGOONS. Mounted infantry — soldiers on horses with muskets/lances who can fight dismounted. Versatile. Single tile, top-down view.
MERCENARIES. Mixed equipment sellswords, various armor styles, coin-purse emblem. Fight for gold, not loyalty. Single tile, top-down view.
TROLLS. Large brutish creatures, thick hide, crude clubs or boulders. Regenerating, fearsome, dim-witted. Single tile, top-down view.
ELITE GUARD. Best-equipped royal soldiers, gilded armor, masterwork weapons, royal banner. The finest troops. Single tile, top-down view.
LIGHT CAVALRY. Fast horsemen with lances and light armor, scouts and flankers. Speed over protection. Single tile, top-down view.
HEAVY CAVALRY. Armored knights on barded warhorses, heavy lances, devastating charge. Thundering hooves. Single tile, top-down view.
CATAPULT. Wooden siege catapult with crew operating it. Boulder loaded, ropes taut. Siege artillery. Single tile, top-down view.
SIEGE ENGINE. Large battering ram or siege tower on wheels, crew pushing it. Designed to breach walls. Single tile, top-down view.
ROC. Enormous bird of prey, wingspan fills the tile. Talons and beak, carries riders on its back. Flying unit. Single tile, top-down view.
KNIGHT. Single heavily armored mounted warrior, full plate, jousting lance, heraldic tabard. Noble and powerful. Single tile, top-down view.
GRIFFON. Eagle-headed lion creature with wings spread, rider on its back. Majestic flying mount. Single tile, top-down view.
WAR ELEPHANT. Massive armored elephant with howdah (fighting platform) on top, archers riding. Devastating. Single tile, top-down view.
ZOMBIES. Undead shambling corpses, rotting flesh, mindless but relentless. Tattered clothing, glowing eyes. Single tile, top-down view.
SPY. Cloaked figure in shadows, dagger hidden, observing. Blend into crowds, intelligence gatherer. Subtle. Single tile, top-down view.
SCOUT. Light ranger with spyglass, fast horse, minimal equipment. Eyes and ears of the army. Single tile, top-down view.
KING. Crowned monarch in royal armor, scepter, royal banner. Regal and commanding presence. Gold accents. Single tile, top-down view.
BARON. Noble lord in fine armor with family crest, lesser crown/coronet, mounted on horse. Aristocratic. Single tile, top-down view.
EMPEROR. Grand ruler in imperial regalia, golden armor, elaborate crown, imperial eagle banner. Supreme authority. Single tile, top-down view.
PRINCE. Young royal in ornate armor, smaller crown, eager and noble. Heir to the throne. Single tile, top-down view.
WIZARD. Robed archmage with glowing staff, spell effects, pointed hat, long beard. Crackling magical energy. Single tile, top-down view.
MAGE. Battle mage in enchanted robes, casting spell with both hands, arcane runes floating. Magical fire/ice. Single tile, top-down view.
POPE/APOSTLE. High priest in white and gold vestments, holy staff, divine light halo. Religious authority. Single tile, top-down view.
BISHOP. Religious leader in ceremonial robes, mitre hat, crozier staff, blessing gesture. Holy aura. Single tile, top-down view.
ADMIRAL. Naval commander on ship's deck, telescope, decorated naval uniform, commanding pose. At the helm. Single tile, top-down view.
CAPTAIN. Military officer with sword drawn, tactical map, experienced veteran. Leading from the front. Single tile, top-down view.
WARLORD. Scarred battle veteran in heavy dark armor, massive weapon, trophy skulls. Fear and respect. Single tile, top-down view.
LORD. Noble warrior-aristocrat in fine plate armor, family sword, coat of arms banner. Distinguished. Single tile, top-down view.
DEMON LORD. Horned demonic figure in infernal armor, flaming sword, hellfire aura, bat wings. Terrifying. Single tile, top-down view.
DEVIL. Cunning fiend with forked tail, dark elegant armor, soul-trapping chains, sinister grin. Evil intelligence. Single tile, top-down view.
DRAGON LORD. Dragon-rider or dragon in humanoid form, scales, fire breath, ancient power. Draconic crown. Single tile, top-down view.
WYRM. Ancient serpentine dragon without wings, coiled and deadly, poisonous breath, scales glinting. Single tile, top-down view.
SHADOW LORD. Dark wraith-like figure, barely visible, shadow tendrils, void where face should be. Terrifying absence. Single tile, top-down view.
NAZGUL. Black-robed ringwraith on dark horse, crown of shadow, morgul blade, dread aura. Undead horror. Single tile, top-down view.
SPIRIT. Ethereal ghostly figure, translucent, floating above ground. Wispy blue-white, haunting presence. Single tile, top-down view.
ASSASSIN. Deadly killer in dark hooded garb, twin daggers, poison vials. Nearly invisible, lethal precision. Single tile, top-down view.
DJINNI/EFREET. Massive fire genie, flaming body, muscular torso emerging from smoke. Desert magic incarnate. Single tile, top-down view.
GARGOYLE. Stone-skinned winged creature, bat wings, horns, clawed feet. Perched and ready to strike. Single tile, top-down view.
WRAITH. Shadowy undead spirit in tattered robes, life-draining touch, glowing red eyes. Chilling cold aura. Single tile, top-down view.
HERO. Legendary warrior champion, masterwork armor, glowing weapon, cape flowing. One-person army. Heroic pose. Single tile, top-down view.
CENTAUR. Half-human half-horse warrior, bow and spear, galloping. Noble forest creature. Single tile, top-down view.
GIANT. Towering humanoid, massive club or boulder. Dwarfs everything around it. Raw primal power. Single tile, top-down view.
SUPERHERO. Ascended champion wreathed in divine light, glowing weapons, angelic power. Beyond mortal. Single tile, top-down view.
MUMMY. Bandage-wrapped undead, ancient Egyptian style, curse aura, scarab beetles. Desert undead. Single tile, top-down view.
ELEMENTAL. Living embodiment of an element — fire/earth/water/air fused into humanoid form. Raw elemental energy. Single tile, top-down view.
MINOTAUR. Bull-headed humanoid with massive double-headed axe. Muscular, raging, labyrinth-born. Single tile, top-down view.
DAEMON. Greater demon from the abyss, wings of shadow, burning claws, hellfire eyes. Pure malice incarnate. Single tile, top-down view.
BALROG. Massive fire demon with flaming whip and sword, wreathed in shadow and flame. Wings of darkness. Single tile, top-down view.
DRAGON. Full-sized dragon, wings spread, breathing fire. Scales glinting, ultimate creature. Fills the entire tile. Single tile, top-down view.

tiles._comment: Overlay tiles shown during combat animations/results

tiles.prompt_fragment: BATTLE indicator. Crossed swords with spark/clash effect. Combat happening here. Clear icon, semi-transparent background. Top-down view.
VICTORY indicator. Golden laurel wreath or victory banner. Triumphant glow. Clear icon, semi-transparent background. Top-down view.
DEFEAT indicator. Broken sword or skull with red X. Loss and destruction. Clear icon, semi-transparent background. Top-down view.
SECTOR CAPTURED. Flag being planted, territory changing hands. Conquest marker. Clear icon, semi-transparent background. Top-down view.
DEVASTATION event. Explosion/fire destroying a sector. Buildings burning, ground scorched. Clear icon, semi-transparent background. Top-down view.
SPELL CAST. Magical energy burst, arcane runes spiraling, spell effect hitting target. Clear icon, semi-transparent background. Top-down view.
ALLIED indicator. Two clasped hands or intertwined banners. Friendship and cooperation. Blue-gold tones. Overlay icon. Top-down view.
TREATY indicator. Scroll/document with seal, peace agreement. Formal accord. Neutral parchment tones. Overlay icon. Top-down view.
HOSTILE indicator. Angry face or clenched fist, tension. Orange-red warning. Danger of war. Overlay icon. Top-down view.
WAR indicator. Crossed swords on red field, blood drops. Active warfare. Aggressive red. Overlay icon. Top-down view.
JIHAD/CRUSADE indicator. Burning eye or holy war symbol, intense flames. Total war, no mercy. Red and black. Overlay icon. Top-down view.

tiles._comment: 5 key terrain types × 4 seasons. Rest can be derived/tinted at runtime.

tiles.prompt_fragment: FLAT terrain in WINTER. Snow-covered plains, frost, bare ground showing through snow. White and grey. Cold. Top-down view.
FLAT terrain in SPRING. Fresh green shoots, melting snow patches, wildflowers beginning to bloom. Renewal. Top-down view.
FLAT terrain in SUMMER. Lush green grass, golden sunlight, full bloom. Warm and vibrant. Peak growth. Top-down view.
FLAT terrain in FALL/AUTUMN. Orange-brown grass, fallen leaves, harvest time. Warm earth tones, golden light. Top-down view.
FOREST in WINTER. Snow-laden branches, bare deciduous trees, dark evergreens. White and dark green. Silent. Top-down view.
FOREST in SPRING. Light green new leaves, blossoming trees, forest floor flowers. Fresh and alive. Top-down view.
FOREST in SUMMER. Dense dark green canopy, full foliage, deep shade beneath. Lush and impenetrable. Top-down view.
FOREST in FALL/AUTUMN. Red, orange, gold leaves. Spectacular color canopy, some bare branches. Warm palette. Top-down view.
GOOD LAND in WINTER. Dormant farmland under light snow, fallow fields, frozen irrigation. Resting. Top-down view.
GOOD LAND in SPRING. Freshly plowed fields, new crop sprouts, busy planting season. Promising green. Top-down view.
GOOD LAND in SUMMER. Golden wheat fields at full height, ripe crops, bountiful. Rich golden-green. Top-down view.
GOOD LAND in FALL/AUTUMN. Harvest time, cut wheat stubble, haystacks, orange pumpkins. Gathering season. Top-down view.
HILLS in WINTER. Snow-dusted rolling hills, brown grass poking through, grey sky feel. Cold and exposed. Top-down view.
HILLS in SPRING. Green hillsides with wildflower patches, sheep grazing, fresh growth. Pastoral. Top-down view.
HILLS in SUMMER. Dry golden grass on hills, full sun, warm earth tones. Mediterranean feel. Top-down view.
HILLS in FALL/AUTUMN. Orange-brown heather, misty mornings, earth tones. Moody and atmospheric. Top-down view.
WATER in WINTER. Partially frozen water, ice sheets, dark cold water beneath. Ice floes and frost. Top-down view.
WATER in SPRING. Melting ice, flowing water, fresh blue, spring rain ripples. Awakening seas. Top-down view.
WATER in SUMMER. Warm blue-green tropical water, calm, sunlit reflections. Inviting. Top-down view.
WATER in FALL/AUTUMN. Grey stormy water, darker tones, choppy waves, overcast reflections. Cold approaching. Top-down view.

tiles._comment: Heat-map / data visualization tiles for the 12 display modes

tiles.prompt_fragment: FOOD HIGH overlay. Bright green glow indicating abundant food production. Rich, fertile indicator. Semi-transparent overlay tile.
FOOD LOW overlay. Red/brown tint indicating food scarcity. Famine warning. Semi-transparent overlay tile.
GOLD HIGH overlay. Bright golden glow indicating wealth. Coins/treasure shimmer. Semi-transparent overlay tile.
GOLD LOW overlay. Grey/dull tint indicating poverty. Empty coffers. Semi-transparent overlay tile.
DEFENSE HIGH overlay. Blue shield glow indicating strong defenses. Fortified, protected. Semi-transparent overlay tile.
DEFENSE LOW overlay. Red vulnerability indicator. Exposed, undefended. Semi-transparent overlay tile.
POPULATION HIGH overlay. Dense crowd dots, bustling indicator. Many people. Semi-transparent overlay tile.
POPULATION LOW overlay. Sparse, empty indicator. Few people, desolate. Semi-transparent overlay tile.
METAL HIGH overlay. Silvery metallic sheen, ore-rich indicator. Mineral wealth. Semi-transparent overlay tile.
METAL LOW overlay. Dull earth tone, resource-poor indicator. No minerals. Semi-transparent overlay tile.
EASY MOVEMENT overlay. Light green path/arrow indicator. Fast travel terrain. Semi-transparent overlay tile.
HARD MOVEMENT overlay. Red/brown mud/bramble indicator. Slow, difficult terrain. Semi-transparent overlay tile.
FOG OF WAR. Dense black/dark fog obscuring everything. Unknown territory. Mysterious, impenetrable darkness. Solid tile.
FOG EDGE. Partial fog — wisps of dark mist fading to transparent. Transition between known and unknown. Semi-transparent.
CURSOR/SELECTION. Glowing green selection bracket or highlight border. Currently selected tile indicator. Semi-transparent with bright edges.
OWN TERRITORY highlight. Subtle colored border/tint showing this sector belongs to you. National color overlay. Semi-transparent.
ENEMY TERRITORY highlight. Red-tinted border showing hostile territory. Danger zone overlay. Semi-transparent.
MOVEMENT PATH. Arrow or dotted line showing planned army movement route. Green/yellow path indicator. Semi-transparent overlay.
EXPLOSION. Fiery blast effect for combat, spells, or devastation. Orange-red fireball. Semi-transparent animated frame. Top-down view.
MAGIC EFFECT. Swirling arcane energy, blue-purple sparkles, enchantment visual. Mystical shimmer. Semi-transparent overlay.

tiles._comment: Colored banners/flags for each nation slot — used to mark ownership on map

tiles.prompt_fragment: RED nation banner. Small flag/pennant in red, planted in terrain. Ownership marker. Clear and distinct. Top-down view.
BLUE nation banner. Small flag/pennant in blue, planted in terrain. Ownership marker. Clear and distinct. Top-down view.

Number 0 indicator tile. The digit '0' clearly readable, styled to match the tileset aesthetic. Semi-transparent background.
Number 1 indicator tile. The digit '1' clearly readable, styled to match the tileset aesthetic. Semi-transparent background.
Number 2 indicator tile. The digit '2', styled to match tileset. Semi-transparent background.
Number 3 indicator tile. The digit '3', styled to match tileset. Semi-transparent background.
Number 4 indicator tile. The digit '4', styled to match tileset. Semi-transparent background.
Number 5 indicator tile. The digit '5', styled to match tileset. Semi-transparent background.
Number 6 indicator tile. The digit '6', styled to match tileset. Semi-transparent background.
Number 7 indicator tile. The digit '7', styled to match tileset. Semi-transparent background.
Number 8 indicator tile. The digit '8', styled to match tileset. Semi-transparent background.
Number 9 indicator tile. The digit '9', styled to match tileset. Semi-transparent background.
Overflow/plus indicator tile. A '+' symbol meaning '10 or more', styled to match tileset. Semi-transparent background.
SHIELD icon. Defensive stat indicator. Small shield shape. Clear icon for UI overlay. Semi-transparent background.
SWORD icon. Attack stat indicator. Small sword shape. Clear icon for UI overlay. Semi-transparent background.
COIN icon. Gold/money indicator. Small gold coin. Clear icon for UI overlay. Semi-transparent background.
FOOD icon. Wheat sheaf or bread. Food production indicator. Clear icon for UI overlay. Semi-transparent background.
PEOPLE icon. Small crowd or person silhouettes. Population indicator. Clear icon for UI overlay. Semi-transparent background.
SKULL icon. Death/danger indicator. Small skull and crossbones. Clear icon for UI overlay. Semi-transparent background.
STAR icon. Special/important indicator. Bright 5-pointed star. Clear icon for UI overlay. Semi-transparent background.
ARROW icon. Movement/direction indicator. Clean directional arrow pointing right. Clear icon for UI overlay. Semi-transparent background.

tiles._comment: Pre-composed common combinations that look better than runtime layering

tiles.prompt_fragment: Walled CITY built on a HILL. Tiered buildings climbing the hillside, walls following terrain contours. Elevated and imposing. Top-down view.
FORT built into MOUNTAIN terrain. Stone fortress carved into mountainside, using natural rock as walls. Impregnable. Top-down view.
FARM on GOOD LAND. Lush organized farmland, golden wheat fields, barn, irrigation. The ideal sector. Top-down view.
Grand CAPITOL on GOOD LAND. Palace surrounded by fertile fields, gardens, roads leading to it. Crown jewel of an empire. Top-down view.
MINE in MOUNTAIN. Deep mine shaft into mountain face, ore carts on tracks, tailings piles. Rich mineral extraction. Top-down view.
LUMBER YARD in FOREST. Clearing in dense forest with sawmill, log stacks, felled trees at the edge. Working forest. Top-down view.
Desert TOWN. Adobe/sandstone buildings, market oasis, palm trees, sand streets. Arid settlement. Top-down view.
Swamp CITY. Stilt buildings over murky water, wooden walkways, moss-covered walls. Dark and damp. Top-down view.
FORT in FOREST. Wooden fort hidden among trees, camouflaged, watchtowers above canopy. Forest stronghold. Top-down view.
ROAD cutting through FOREST. Clear path through dense trees, cobblestones visible, canopy arching over. Travel route. Top-down view.
ARMY marching through FOREST. Soldiers visible between trees, column winding through woods, difficult terrain march. Top-down view.
NAVY with embarked ARMY. Warship with troops visible on deck, shields along gunwale, combined naval-military force. On water. Top-down view.
DEVASTATED CITY. Once-grand city now in ruins, burning buildings, collapsed walls, smoke. War's aftermath. Top-down view.
